microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end delivery of Azure's **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling workflows that eliminated 30% of operational toil and scaled the program to 45+ annual enterprise drills.

Architected and deployed Azure's first rack-level proactive resilience testing capability in **4 months**, achieving a 94% recovery rate and surfacing critical hardware defects across strategic customer environments.
Built a custom **AI agent** for drill planning that cut planning-cycle time by 39% and expanded drill capacity by 21%, directly feeding product insights back to the core engineering team.

Led 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility — including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** — translating technical complexity for C-suite stakeholders.

Scaled a 2-person validation operation into a platformized system driving **$14M+ business impact**, partnering directly with Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp on custom integration scoping and deployment.
microsoft_2023: Deployed AI-driven **code generation workflows** across 14 Azure service teams, running hands-on technical sessions that drove sustained adoption and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Scoped and shipped an **intent-based YAML generation** feature by conducting 11+ discovery interviews with enterprise engineering teams, translating field insights directly into actionable product requirements.
Accelerated unstructured-data retrieval by **83%** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool and enforcing metadata standards across a large corpus of internal content.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch timelines by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ enterprise service teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then **architected a roadmap** to automate critical deployment paths and eliminate execution bottlenecks.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact engineering investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional deployment execution.

Implemented automated **CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and enabling faster iteration across the robotics platform.
Prioritized 40+ high-severity tickets across Agile sprints, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking critical path work tied to the broader fleet transition.
pro_painters: Boosted job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, building a new CRM process that reduced turnaround time and improved close rates.
Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website, Google profile, and targeted outreach workflows.

Surfaced margin leaks and improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records**, delivering a profitability framework that informed resource allocation and job-level pricing decisions.
